subject: [PATCH v2 26/28] nfsd: properly track requested child attributes

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of child attributes in NFSv4 delegation by tracking the union of requested and supported attributes, and only encoding the attributes in that union when sending add/remove/rename updates. This ensures that only valid attributes are sent to the client, preventing potential issues with attribute mismatches or inconsistencies. The patch modifies several files in the nfsd directory to implement this change, including nfs4proc.c, nfs4state.c, and nfs4xdr.c.
